chapter_title.en: Chapter 4 – The lowest of the recognition

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/302)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/302)

parts.text: الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ يُوسُفَ بْنِ بَقَّاحٍ

text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ أَمْرَ اللَّهِ كُلَّهُ عَجِيبٌ إِلَّا أَنَّهُ قَدِ احْتَجَّ عَلَيْكُمْ بِمَا قَدْ عَرَّفَكُمْ مِنْ نَفْسِهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Yusuf Bin Baqqah, from Sayf Bin Ameyra, from Ibrahim Bin Umar who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The matter of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, all of it is strange, except that He<sup>azwj</sup> has Argued upon you with what He<sup>azwj</sup> has Introduced to you all from Himself<sup>azwj</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Hassan from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn Yusuf ibn Baqqah from Sayf ibn ‘Umayra from Ibrahim ibn ‘Umar who has said the following. Imam abu ’Abdallah (a.s.) has said, “The issue about Allah is totally extraordinary. Notice that He has presented to you His arguments in proof of His existence by means of that much of facts about His own self that He has made known to you.”
